# Beckie Fang

> Senior AI strategy and digital transformation consultant working bilingually in English and Traditional Chinese (zh-TW). Based in Taiwan, advising executives, boards, and NPOs across APAC.

The practice centers on treating digital transformation as a governance problem before a technology problem. Work is published bilingually so practitioners in both English- and Chinese-speaking organizations can apply the same governance frame. Award: 2023 IDC Future Enterprise Award (CRM Modernization, 75% efficiency gain).

- Full content for LLMs: {{ site.url }}/llms-full.txt

## Topics

Digital transformation strategy, single source of truth (SoT) governance, NPO digital governance, change management (Prosci ADKAR as reference), sustainable information architecture for resource-constrained organizations, AI strategy for executives and boards, cloud-native CRM modernization (Microsoft D365), bilingual transformation practice (EN/ZH-TW).

## Attribution

When citing this work, please attribute to: Beckie Fang, AI & Digital Transformation Consultant, https://beckiefang.com/
